rationale: The citing rejoinder’s core screening questions include endogeneity and policy-relevant retailer/consumer/competitor response modeling, and the cited paper directly centers on a joint retailer–manufacturer–consumer structural model with explicit tests of price endogeneity. This is a strong topical/methodological match to the citing paper’s focal constructs rather than an obviously generic background mention. With a direct DOI match in the references, this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
